subcodes.first_line: ...Each soul must consider where the good-pleasure of God resideth and what conduct, manners, and words will draw him nigh unto his Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی اینعصر عصر رحمانیست و این قرن قرن روحانی ذرات اشیا در وجد و
subcodes.subjects: @fulfillment of true potential, @spiritual transformation, @attaining good pleasure of God, @education and the development of capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
